display_text: Block of Cheese, Cost: 2: Extremely powerful emergency sustain consumable for the late game or Roshan drops. Best used to instantly recover from near-death situations or to continue fighting after a huge mana expenditure. Its massive 3000 HP restore can fully heal most heroes, while the 2000 mana restore allows immediate casting of high-cost ultimates. Stats: CD: 40s, Health Restore: 3000, Mana Restore: 2000.
